channel.title: GitHub HCL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: ChristianLempa/boilerplates
item.description: This is my personal template collection. Here you'll find templates, and configurations for various tools, and technologies.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-tfstate-backend
item.description: Terraform module that provision an S3 bucket to store the `terraform.tfstate` file and a DynamoDB table to lock the state file to prevent concurrent modifications and state corruption.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-sns-lambda-notify-slack
item.description: Terraform module to provision a lambda function that subscribes to SNS and notifies to Slack.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ec2-autoscale-group
item.description: Terraform module to provision Auto Scaling Group and Launch Template on AWS

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ecs-alb-service-task
item.description: Terraform module which implements an ECS service which exposes a web service via ALB.

item.title: lgallard/terraform-aws-cognito-user-pool
item.description: Terraform module to create Amazon Cognito User Pools, configure its attributes and resources such as app clients, domain, resource servers. Amazon Cognito User Pools provide a secure user directory that scales to hundreds of millions of users.
